---
title: "ESMV Aufgabe zu UE3"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-17"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

#Laden der Bibliotheken
library(rstudioapi)
library(tidyverse)

Sys.unsetenv("VIRTUAL_ENV")
library(reticulate)
py_require("MIDIUtil")
py_require("mido")
py_require("pandas")
py_require("music21")
py_require("partitura")
py_require("setuptools")
py_require("typing-extensions")
py_config()
py_require()

setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))  
```

Problembehebung von show.score() unter Windows. Für Mac User nicht notwendig.

```{python}
#____________________________________________________________________
# habe eine lösung gefubden-1 SAATCHI 
# =>(r vor 'C muss sein  und hier braucht keine write)
from music21 import environment
us = environment.UserSettings()
us['musescoreDirectPNGPath'] = r'C:\Program Files\MuseScore 4\bin\MuseScore4.exe'
us['musicxmlPath'] = r'C:\Program Files\MuseScore 4\bin\MuseScore4.exe'
#____________________________________________________________________

import subprocess
import os

_original_init = subprocess.Popen.__init__

def _patched_init(self, *args, **kwargs):
    # Fehlende Handles durch DEVNULL ersetzen
    for key in ('stdin', 'stdout', 'stderr'):
        if key not in kwargs:
            kwargs[key] = subprocess.DEVNULL
    _original_init(self, *args, **kwargs)

subprocess.Popen.__init__ = _patched_init
```

#Aufgabe 1/2/3/4
Bitte kopieren Sie diese Datei für jede Aufgabe.

```{python}
#Importieren aller Module
from music21 import * 

#Konfigurieren von music21
#[1] - No - No - Yes
configure.run()

from music21 import corpus
import os

score = corpus.parse("beethoven/opus132")

#Suchen nach einem Komponisten im music21-Korpus
paths = corpus.getComposer("Beethoven")

#Einlesen einer Komposition
score = corpus.parse(paths[0])

score = corpus.parse("beethoven/opus132")

#____________________________________________________________________
# habe eine lösung gefubden-2 SAATCHI:

# macht und nent  eine musicxml file von gewelte music zb. Jetz von : ("beethoven/opus132") -> dauert bischen
fp = score.write('musicxml')


#Zeigt musicxml file Adresse: C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Temp\music21\(zb.: tmpg28a9pta oder andere name ).musicxml 
print(fp)


#Start File (z.b in music score )
os.startfile(fp)

#_____________________________________________________________________

#Extrahieren einer Stimme (Violine I)
violin = score.parts[0]

#Extrahieren eines Taktes aus der Stimme
measure = violin[1]

#Takte können auch über die measure() Funktion ausgelesen werden
measure_one = violin.measure(1)

import subprocess

# macht und nent  eine musicxml file von gewelte music  : ("beethoven/opus132") -> und rename -> edited_score.musicxml - dauert bischen
fp=r'C:\Users\User\Desktop\edited_score.musicxml')

# macht eine copy und nent  eine musicxml file von gewelte music  : ("beethoven/opus132") ->nent -> edited_score 
fp = score.write('musicxml',

subprocess.Popen([r'C:\Program Files\MuseScore 4\bin\MuseScore4.exe', fp])
 
#macht änderung:
score.parts[0].measure(1).append(note.Note('C5'))

#änderung done save changed score:
fp = score.write('musicxml', 

# macht  wieder noch mal eine neue copy ( mit änderung) und renam zu ->my_score.musicxml und ändert oder write was Sie geschrieben in diesee xml file(my-score) - dauert bischen

fp='C:/Users/User/Desktop/my_score.musicxml'

# open file in default app (MuseScore if associated) mit änderung :-) - dauert bischen

os.startfile(fp)


# Aber es ist schön :-),  und :

# score.show() Funktioniert wieder nicht , und:

# Aber Frage : os.startfile(fp) ist fast selbe oder ? 

#MfG 

#____________________________________________________________________


#AUFGABEN UE3


#Clef___________________________________________________________________

print(list(measure_one.recurse().getElementsByClass(clef.Clef)))
#antwort: [<music21.clef.TrebleClef>]

# für löchen :  
# for c in list(violin.recurse().getElementsByClass(clef.Clef)):c.activeSite.remove(c)
# für schreiben :insert

alto = clef.AltoClef()
m = stream.Measure([alto])
m.append(note.Note('C4'))

bass = clef.BassClef()
m.append(bass)
m.append(note.Note('C4'))

# Antwort : C4 = C4 clef No Mather 

#End-Clef

#Mehrstimmigkeit______________________________________________________
cMinor = chord.Chord(['C4','G4','E-5'])
#chord


violin2 = score.parts[1]
measure_four = violin2.measure(4)
print(list(measure_four.recurse().getElementsByClass(stream.Voice)))
#keine voice in 4te takt violin 2 im beethoven/opus132

print(list(measure_four.recurse().getElementsByClass(chord.Chord)))
#Aber 2 ton Als chord  in 4te takt violin 2 im beethoven/opus132
#Antwort [<music21.chord.Chord A3 F#4>]


#interval ?

#End-Mehrstimmigkeit

#Triole____________________________________________________________
d = duration.Duration()
d.quarterLength = 0.5
d.type
'eighth'
d.tupets


a = duration.Duration('quarter')
b = duration.durationTupleFromTypeDots('quarter', 0)
a.addDurationTuple(b)
a.quarterLength

tup = duration.Tuplet(3, 2)
d = duration.Duration(1.0)
d.appendTuplet(tup)
d.quarterLength
Fraction(2, 3)
t2 = duration.Tuplet(5, 4)
d.appendTuplet(t2)
d.quarterLength
Fraction(8, 15)
tup.frozen


violin2 = score.parts[1]
measure_four = violin2.measure(4)

for note in measure_four.recurse().notes:
  if note.duration.tuplets:
    print("Note:", note)
     print("Tuplet:",note.duration.tuplets)

#Antwort:  Tuplet: (), 
#keine triole in 4te takt violin 2 im beethoven/opus132

#End-Triole

#Haltebogen-Tie____________________________________________________________

 
 c0 = note.Note('C4')
c0.tie = tie.Tie('start')
c1 = note.Note('C4')
c1.tie = tie.Tie('continue')
c2 = note.Note('C4')
c2.tie = tie.Tie('stop')
s = stream.Measure()
s.append([c0, c1, c2])


s = stream.Stream()
for tie_style in ('normal', 'dotted', 'dashed', 'hidden'):
    nStart = note.Note('E4')
    tStart = tie.Tie('start')
    tStart.style = tie_style
    nStart.tie = tStart
    nStop = note.Note('E4')
    tStop = tie.Tie('stop')
    tStop.style = tie_style # optional
    nStop.tie = tStop
    s.append([nStart, nStop])


violin2 = score.parts[1]
measure_four = violin2.measure(4)

n1 = score.recurse().notes[1]
n1
 #Antwort :<music21.note.Note E>
for note in measure_four.recurse().notes:
  if note.tie :
    print("Note:", note.nameWithOctave, note.tie)
      #Antwort :Note: G#4 None
      
      violin1 = score.parts[0]
measure_eghit = violin1.measure(8)
    for note in measure_eghit.recurse().notes:
  if note.tie :
    print("Note:", note.nameWithOctave, note.tie)

#Bindebogen-Slur___________________________________________________________
violin1 = score.parts[0]
measure_eghit = violin1.measure(8)
slurs = list(measure_eghit.recurse().getElementsByClass(spanner.Slur))
print(slurs)
 for slure in slurs:
    for note in slurs.getSpannedElements():
        print("Note:", n.nameWithOctave)
     
     
p = converter.parse("tinynotation: 4/4 c4 d e f g a b c' b a g2")
c = p.recurse().notes[0]
d = p.recurse().notes[1]
sl1 = spanner.Slur([c, d])
sl1

violin2 = score.parts[1]
   print(len(list(score.recurse().getElementsByClass(spanner.Slur))))
    #Antwort :  3177
    
  for slur in score.recurse().getElementsByClass(spanner.Slur):
    for n in slur.getSpannedElements():
        if hasattr(n, "nameWithOctave"):
            print(n.nameWithOctave)
    #Antwort : All note name :
    
    part = score.parts[1]   

for m in range(1, 31):
    measure = part.measure(m)
    if measure is None:
     
 print("Takt:", m)

    slurs = measure.recurse().getElementsByClass(spanner.Slur)

    for s in slurs:
        for n in s.getSpannedElements():
            if hasattr(n, "nameWithOctave"):
                print("Note:", n.nameWithOctave)

  for slur in score.recurse().getElementsByClass(spanner.Slur):
    for n in slur.getSpannedElements():
        if hasattr(n, "nameWithOctave"):
            print(n.nameWithOctave)
   
#End____________________________________________________________________













```
